div.p: Dissemination and state transitions for node departure. Engineers: Implement byte-ordering as Big-Endian per wire format spec.

g.text: PHASE 1: Initiation (Node A increments incarnation and broadcasts LEAVE)
PHASE 2: Mark & Disseminate (Peers merge LEFT state and begin gossip)

ul.li: 🟡 LEFT: Departure initiated by Node A
🔵 UPDATED: Peer has merged the LEFT event
🔴 CHANGED: State transition in current phase

div.p: UDP Payload Structure (Binary) Fields: Offset | Field Description | Size

ul.li: Pre-emptive Inc: Node must increment local incarnation before sending.
Bypass Suspect: LEFT signals are immediate. Do not initiate ping-retry logic.
Ack-less: LEAVE is a best-effort UDP broadcast/gossip; no direct ACK expected.
Cleanup: Purge node from active routing table after 2 * T_gossip.
Conflict: If Peer sees inc=6, ALIVE and receives inc=6, LEFT, LEFT wins.
